findings: Bundle requires: task_id, run_id, commander_id, status, role, profile, swarm_scale, branch, files_changed, summary, confidence, consensus, telemetry (stampede-commander.agent.md:254-282)
Same bundle shape for success/partial/failed - only status-specific rules differ (stampede-commander.agent.md:140-146)
Partial must include exact launch counts; failed if no Squad Leads launched
Validation exists only for launch proof - no explicit bundle completeness check before write (stampede-commander.agent.md:59-61)
README documents partial bundle requirement but not bundle JSON schema (README.md:35,130)
gaps: No explicit pre-write bundle completeness/schema validation; README lacks bundle field-level documentation
